---
name: New script request
about: Suggest a concept or topic to add to the learning path
title: "[SCRIPT REQUEST] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What concept should be added?**
e.g. "Function Calling", "RAG with FAISS", "Streaming responses"

**Why is it useful for learners?**
Explain what someone will understand after working through this script.

**Where in the learning path does it fit?**
e.g. After file 9, as a new Part 7

**Any relevant links or references?**
e.g. OpenAI docs, blog posts, papers
